# Gray Tile & Remodeling

## Business Information

**Company:** Gray Tile & Remodeling
**Type:** Tile installation and home remodeling contractor
**Location:** 220 Fowler Dr, Bowdon, GA 30108
**Phone:** (Not yet provided — contact via website)
**Email:** info@gray-tile-remodeling.pageone.cloud
**Website:** https://gray-tile-remodeling.pageone.cloud
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 8am–6pm | Saturday 9am–2pm
**Founded:** 2001 (25 years in business)
**Licensed & Insured:** Yes

## Service Area

Primary: Bowdon, GA (Carroll County)
Also serving: Carrollton, Villa Rica, Bremen, Temple, and communities throughout Carroll County and West Georgia (~50-mile radius of Bowdon)

## Services

- Kitchen Remodeling
- Bathroom Remodeling
- Basement Finishing
- Basement Kitchen Remodeling
- Attic Remodeling
- Room Additions
- Full Home Remodel
- Custom Remodeling
- Structural Renovation
- Eco-Friendly Remodeling
- Home Additions
- Plumbing Services
- Electrical Services
- HVAC Services
- Open Floor Plan Remodeling
- Custom Tile Showers
- Flooring Installation
- Sanded Finish Flooring
- LVP Flooring
- Subfloor Replacement
- Design-Build Remodeling
- Home Restoration
- Garage Conversion
- Home Upgrades
- Framing Contractor

## Key Differentiators

- Specialized tile expertise — not a general contractor
- 25 years of Georgia market experience
- Custom design consultation and visualization
- Understanding of Georgia humidity/moisture challenges for tile
- Complete design-build process (design + construction, one team)
- Licensed and insured

## Pages

- / — Homepage: Overview of services, reviews, process, and FAQs
- /services/ — All services overview
- /services/remodeling-services/ — Kitchen, bathroom, basement, attic, room additions, full home remodel
- /services/flooring-services/ — Tile showers, LVP, hardwood refinishing, subfloor replacement
- /services/seasonal-services/ — Plumbing, electrical, HVAC for remodeling projects
- /services/design-build-remodeling/ — Integrated design-and-build process
- /services/home-restoration/ — Older home revival and historic renovation
- /services/garage-conversion/ — Garage-to-living-space conversions
- /services/home-upgrades/ — Targeted tile, fixture, and surface improvements
- /services/framing-contractor/ — Residential framing for additions and remodels
- /about/ — Company story, 25-year history, craftsmanship approach
- /service-area/ — Coverage map and cities served in Carroll County and West Georgia
- /contact/ — Free estimate request form
- /privacy-policy/ — Privacy Policy (CCPA/CPRA compliant)
- /terms/ — Terms of Service
- /cookie-policy/ — Cookie disclosures
- /accessibility/ — WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility statement
